embeds.title: Morimens: Doll: Inferno Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovecr...
embeds.description: “Genius and madness are separated by a fine line. Once the brightest genius of Mythag, her downfall was like a collapsing building, leaving only the most deranged fiend crawling out from the ruins of reason. She routinely donned the cloak of science, pouring life, humanity, love, and destruction int
